title: Context, Cancellation, Backpressure, Structured Concurrency, and Leaks · Runtime Contract: Context Values Boundary
summary: A request launches several operations; one fails, one blocks, one outlives the caller, and overload grows without bound. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go context values boundary increment in a cancelable bounded worker group. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use context values only for request-scoped cross-boundary metadata with collision-safe keys, not optional parameters.
Derive, propagate, call, and observe cancellation, deadlines, timeouts, and causes while releasing timer resources.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
